name: Cafè de la Plaça
summary: Central Puigcerda cafe fallback near Plaça de Santa Maria; treat as practical caffeine, not verified specialty coffee.
whyItMatters: Puigcerda is a viewing-day base/route point with limited source-backed specialty coffee, so a central fallback may still be useful.
pros: Mapped cafe in the central square area
Likely convenient for meeting, bathrooms, and quick caffeine before the Stage 3 viewing window
Better to have a fallback pinned than to search cold on race day
cons: No strong source found proving specialty-coffee quality
Central Puigcerda may be affected by Stage 3 access/crowding

logistics.distance_from_base: Central Puigcerda; exact lodging distance unknown
logistics.distance_from_viewing_point: Potentially close to the Puigcerda viewing area, depending on final spot
logistics.parking: Unknown; race-day parking needs separate viewing logistics research
logistics.road_closure_notes: Stage 3 passes Puigcerda; verify closures and pedestrian access before relying on this

timing.best_visit_window: Morning before settling into the Stage 3 viewing position
timing.race_day_risk: High because Puigcerda is on/near the Stage 3 route

sources.title: OpenStreetMap Cafè de la Plaça
sources.note: Supports mapped existence and coordinates; does not establish coffee quality or hours.

sources.title: Research agent launch packet current viewing days
sources.note: Supports Puigcerda as the Stage 3 viewing area in the itinerary.

open_questions: Find a better Puigcerda source for quality and hours, or replace with a bakery/cafe verified by local tourism or current map listings.
Confirm whether the cafe is inside any Stage 3 closure zone.
